title: Decibel
description: Minecraft resource pack adding a variety of high-quality music to compliment any situation. 1.7.2-1.21.8 support!
body:
![Decibel logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e9966a6410ec09e22e333a5dd0b65ccc22b8852.png) # Decibel Minecraft resource pack adding a variety of high-quality music to compliment any situation. 1.7.2-1.21.8 support! [![Decibel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f487d7c34c407c9cf899fd0601bb71e6286f6855_0.webp)](https://github.com/RealWTBking/Decibel) [![Music Request](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b3f8b593beff09c9aaa156bc4707e6ffe1b5f56.png)](https://github.com/RealWTBking/Decibel/issues/new?template=music-request.yml) [![Bug Report](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc47f31da9bc97da82aa43be0bb0078fd940d964.png)](https://github.com/RealWTBking/Decibel/issues/new?template=bug-report.yml) [![Music Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257582599883f3f56d0ee962caae05722474b289.png)](https://github.com/RealWTBking/Decibel/blob/main/CREDITS.md)
Decibel is a resource pack that adds a variety of high-quality music for Minecraft 1.7.2-1.21.8. With a wide selection of pre-made packages to choose from, Decibel offers a solution for nearly any scenario. New releases soon! ## Download [![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb56a40d66d636e7586822ea3df5ebaf4db3cd26.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/decibel) ## Credits
